CCC.Settings.UseStressLevel.Name: Use Stress Level
CCC.Settings.UseStressLevel.Hint: Enable the Stress Level tracker overlay. Increases difficulty of all d20 rolls by the current stress value.
CCC.Settings.GlobalStressLevel.Name: Global Stress Level
CCC.Settings.ResistanceDie.Name: Vampiric Resistance Die
CCC.Settings.ResistanceDie.Hint: Die rolled for the HP bonus added to Vampiric Resistance each time the curse is applied. Default: 1d8.
CCC.Settings.TrinketDie.Name: Personal Trinket HP Die
CCC.Settings.TrinketDie.Hint: Die rolled for the HP bonus granted by each Personal Trinket. Default: 1d6.
CCC.Vampiric.CardPrompt: The curse calls. Roll your fate.
CCC.Vampiric.EndGamePrompt: The vampiric powers grows inside you...
CCC.Vampiric.TrinketCardPrompt: A personal trinket was found. You got a warm memory of your life.
CCC.Vampiric.Audit.Title: Vampiric History
CCC.Vampiric.Audit.PurgeConfirm: Erase all curse, soul save and trinket history for {name}?
CCC.Vampiric.SoulSaveAttempted: A soul save was attempted. The result is hidden until the final reckoning.
CCC.Encounter.ResetAllConfirm: Reset every encounter counter back to zero?
CCC.Encounter.DefeatedTip: Skip this encounter on random rolls
CCC.Encounter.AllExhausted: All encounters are defeated or exhausted (4/4). Reset some before rolling.
CCC.Encounter.Config.MenuHint: Map each encounter slot to an Actor, a Journal Entry (4 pages = 4 outcomes) and per-outcome sounds.
CCC.Encounter.Config.Title: Scaling Encounters — Configuration
CCC.Encounter.Config.Intro: Drag an Actor, Journal Entry or Playlist Sound from its sidebar onto the matching field. Leave a journal blank to keep the built-in fallback text. Pages are read in their sort order: page 1 = outcome 1, etc.
CCC.Encounter.Config.IntroTextHint: HTML allowed. Inline rolls like [[/r 1d6]] become clickable. Shown above the roll button.
CCC.Encounter.Config.Label: Label
CCC.Encounter.Config.JournalHint: Drop a Journal Entry whose first 4 pages are the four outcome texts.
CCC.Encounter.Config.ResetConfirm: Discard all custom encounter mappings and restore the defaults?
CCC.Encounter.Config.WrongType: Expected a {expected} but got a different document type.
